description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in a distinctive urban outfit featuring a hooded jacket with prominent, spiked dorsal fins running from the top of the hood down the back, reminiscent of a Godzilla or kaiju-inspired design. The jacket is paired with matching pants and boots, all in a dark, matte finish. The front of the jacket reveals a blue, patterned shirt underneath, adding a splash of color to the otherwise monochromatic ensemble. The figure's hands are exposed, and the face is partially visible beneath the hood, with a neutral expression. The overall appearance is both functional and stylized, blending streetwear with fantasy elements. The spiked back detail is the most visually striking feature, making the figure stand out in any urban environment.
description: An adult pedestrian in a dark, hooded jacket with dramatic spiked fins down the back, paired with matching pants and boots, and a blue shirt visible at the front.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full length of the spiked dorsal fins running from the hood to the lower back, and the back details of the jacket and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the spiked fins and the layered look of the jacket and pants.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the hooded face, blue shirt beneath the jacket, and the symmetrical stance with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a clear silhouette of the spiked fins and the fitted nature of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded jacket with spiked dorsal fins, matching pants, and boots
attribute_hairstyle: short hair partially covered by hood
